svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="pr-all" id="prall"> <mxGraphModel dx="-574" dy="-178" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="/pr-all 四阶段：CI 的核心是「审查 → 自动修复 → 收敛后才合并」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="740" x="180" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="阶段① 同步 dev 解冲突" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="260" x="420" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1d" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="pull-all dev：主仓 + 子模块逐个 merge
冲突按约定逐文件确认，禁止 --ours 丢弃" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="360" x="370" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="阶段② 建 MR 到 dev" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="260" x="420" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2d" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="frontend → backend → operation → 主仓
无改动的仓库跳过，单仓失败不中断" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="360" x="370" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="阶段③ @code-reviewer 审查" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="260" x="420" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3d" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="只读 subagent：edit/bash 都 deny
输出 🔴必须修 / 🟡建议修 / 🔵提示 三级清单" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="360" x="370" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="阶段④ 自动修复 + 收敛后才合并" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="260" x="420" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4d" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="主会话修 🔴🟡 → verify 无回归 → push 更新 MR
🔴 清零才 merge-all-to-dev；否则停下汇报" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="360" x="370" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#d97706;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="未收敛 → 回阶段③ 重审" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="180" x="730" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eloop" edge="1" parent="1" source="s4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#d97706;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;endArrow=none;" target="s3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="900" y="422" /> <mxPoint x="900" y="312" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="yunxiao" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#d97706;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="云效 CI 做不到阶段④：流水线只会报红挂掉，不会自己改完再合并" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="860" x="120" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 430px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: /pr-all 四阶段：CI 的核心是「审查 → 自动修复 → 收敛后才合并」

输出 🔴必须修 / 🟡建议修 / 🔵提示 三级清单

div.div: 阶段④ 自动修复 + 收敛后才合并

div.div:
主会话修 🔴🟡 → verify 无回归 → push 更新 MR
🔴 清零才 merge-all-to-dev；否则停下汇报

div.div: 未收敛 → 回阶段③ 重审

div.div: 云效 CI 做不到阶段④：流水线只会报红挂掉，不会自己改完再合并
